title: Light Battered Irish Mackerel Grill
description: A kid-friendly, keto-friendly take on traditional Irish mackerel with a light, mustardy batter grilled to perfection. Serve immediately for the best flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: Baking soda
ingredients.notes: gluten-free alternative to traditional Irish batter

ingredients.name: Buttermilk
ingredients.notes: or substitute with almond milk for dairy-free option

ingredients.name: Mustard seeds
ingredients.notes: black or brown mustard seeds work well

instructions: Pat dry the mackerel fillets with a paper towel to remove excess moisture.
In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, buttermilk, and mustard seeds.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and stir until the batter is smooth.
Dip each mackerel fillet into the batter, coating both sides evenly.
Place the battered mackerel on the preheated grill and cook for 4-6 minutes per side, or until the batter is golden brown and the fish is cooked through.
Remove the mackerel from the grill and let it rest for a few minutes before serving.
